sentences.target: Ich sitze seit acht Uhr in der Ordination.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzɪtsə zaɪ̯t axt uːɐ̯ ɪn deːɐ̯ ɔʁdinaˈʦi̯oːn/

translations.de: Ich sitze seit acht Uhr in der Ordination.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzɪtsə zaɪ̯t axt uːɐ̯ ɪn deːɐ̯ ɔʁdinaˈʦi̯oːn/
translations.en: I've been waiting at the doctor's since eight.
translations.es: Llevo esperando en el consultorio desde las ocho.
translations.fr: J'attends chez le médecin depuis huit heures.
translations.zh-Hans: 我从八点就在诊所等着。
translations.ru: Я жду у врача с восьми.
translations.pt: Estou esperando no consultório desde as oito.
translations.he: אני מחכה אצל הרופא מאז שמונה.
translations.vi: Tôi đã chờ ở phòng khám từ tám giờ.
translations.ar: أنا أنتظر عند الطبيب منذ الساعة الثامنة.
translations.nl: Ik wacht sinds acht uur bij de dokter.
translations.uk: Я чекаю у лікаря з восьмої.
translations.hu: Nyolc óra óta a rendelőben várok.
translations.hi: मैं आठ बजे से डॉक्टर के क्लिनिक में इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Περιμένω στο ιατρείο από τις οκτώ.
translations.nb: Jeg har ventet hos legen siden klokka åtte.
translations.id: Saya sudah menunggu di klinik sejak jam delapan.
translations.sv: Jag har väntat hos läkaren sedan klockan åtta.
translations.ro: Aștept la cabinet de la ora opt.
translations.da: Jeg har ventet hos lægen siden klokken otte.
translations.ja: 8時からずっと病院で待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense (1st sg), expressing the state of sitting.
Preposition governing the dative; marks the starting point in time.
Cardinal number specifying the time.
Noun used in clock-time expressions; head of the time phrase 'acht Uhr'.
Preposition governing the dative here; indicates location.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Ordination'.
Feminine noun (Austrian German: doctor's practice/office); object of 'in' in the dative.

sentences.target: Die Ordination macht um neun Uhr auf.
sentences.reading: /diː ɔʁdinaˈʦi̯oːn maxt ʊm nɔʏ̯n uːɐ̯ aʊ̯f/

translations.de: Die Ordination macht um neun Uhr auf.
translations.ipa: /diː ɔʁdinaˈʦi̯oːn maxt ʊm nɔʏ̯n uːɐ̯ aʊ̯f/
translations.en: The office opens at nine o'clock.
translations.es: El consultorio abre a las nueve.
translations.fr: Le cabinet ouvre à neuf heures.
translations.vi: Phòng khám mở cửa lúc chín giờ.
translations.nl: De praktijk gaat om negen uur open.
translations.ro: Cabinetul se deschide la ora nouă.
translations.ja: 病院は9時に開院します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; marks the subject.
Feminine noun; grammatical subject of the sentence.
Finite part of the separable verb 'aufmachen' (to open), 3rd person singular present; main verb.
Preposition governing the accusative in temporal use; introduces a clock time.
Cardinal number; part of the time expression.
Noun used in time expressions; head of 'neun Uhr' governed by 'um'.
Separable verbal particle completing 'aufmachen'; placed at clause end.

sentences.target: Ich rufe gleich bei der Ordination an.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʁuːfə glaɪ̯ç baɪ̯ deːɐ̯ ɔʁdinaˈʦi̯oːn an/

translations.de: Ich rufe gleich bei der Ordination an.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʁuːfə glaɪ̯ç baɪ̯ deːɐ̯ ɔʁdinaˈʦi̯oːn an/
translations.en: I'll call the doctor's office in a moment.
translations.es: En un momento voy a llamar al consultorio.
translations.fr: Je vais appeler le cabinet dans un instant.
translations.zh-Hans: 我一会儿给诊所打电话。
translations.yue: 我陣間會打電話去診所。
translations.pt: Daqui a pouco vou ligar para o consultório.
translations.vi: Chút nữa tôi sẽ gọi cho phòng khám.
translations.hi: मैं थोड़ी देर में क्लिनिक को फोन करूँगा।
translations.el: Σε λίγο θα τηλεφωνήσω στο ιατρείο.
translations.id: Sebentar lagi saya akan menelepon klinik.
translations.sv: Jag ringer mottagningen om en stund.
translations.ro: Într-o clipă o să sun la cabinet.
translations.da: Om lidt ringer jeg til klinikken.
translations.ja: もうすぐ病院に電話します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite part of the separable verb 'anrufen' (to call/phone), present 1st sg; main verb component.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase, indicating imminence ('right away/soon').
Preposition governing the dative; indicates contact/location 'at' an organization.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Ordination'.
Feminine noun; object of 'bei' in the dative.
Separable verbal particle completing 'anrufen'; appears at clause end.

sentences.target: Meine Mutter arbeitet in einer Ordination.

translations.de: Meine Mutter arbeitet in einer Ordination.
translations.en: My mother works at a doctor's office.
translations.es: Mi madre trabaja en un consultorio.
translations.fr: Ma mère travaille dans un cabinet médical.
translations.it: Mia madre lavora in uno studio medico.
translations.pt: Minha mãe trabalha em um consultório.
translations.vi: Mẹ tôi làm việc ở phòng khám.
translations.nl: Mijn moeder werkt in een huisartsenpraktijk.
translations.hi: मेरी माँ डॉक्टर के क्लिनिक में काम करती हैं।
translations.el: Η μητέρα μου δουλεύει σε ιατρείο.
translations.nb: Moren min jobber på et legekontor.
translations.sv: Min mamma jobbar på en klinik.
translations.ro: Mama mea lucrează la un cabinet medical.
translations.da: Min mor arbejder på en klinik.
translations.ja: 母はクリニックで働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative feminine singular; modifies 'Mutter'.
Feminine common noun; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, present tense (3rd sg); predicates the activity.
Preposition governing the dative here; indicates place of work.
Indefinite article, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Ordination'.
Feminine noun (Austrian German); object of 'in' in the dative.
